description_long: This hammer features a robust, dark metallic head with a dual-purpose design: one side is a flat striking face, while the opposite end tapers into a pointed wedge, typical of a cross-peen hammer. The head is securely mounted on a smoothly finished, slightly curved wooden handle, which appears ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip. The wood grain is visible, giving the handle a natural, polished appearance. The metallic head has a matte to semi-gloss finish, with no visible rust or wear marks. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for tasks such as metalworking or masonry. No visible branding, logos, or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A cross-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a polished, curved wooden handle, designed for durability and ergonomic use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the profile of the hammer head, with the peen and striking face visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the hammer head, the flat striking face, and the pointed peen extending forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the hammer head's profile, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the alignment of the handle with the hammer head, clearly displaying the cross-peen and striking face.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle with a smooth, polished finish and visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for grip
attribute_head_type: cross-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one pointed wedge (peen), made of dark steel
